title: Jamaican Pasta Bake
description: A flavorful and comforting pasta dish infused with Jamaican spices and topped with a crunchy breadcrumb mix.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add jerk seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add tomato sauce to the skillet and stir to combine with jerk seasoning. Bring to a simmer.
Stir in cooked pasta to coat with sauce.
Transfer pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with breadcrumbs.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until breadcrumbs are golden brown.
Garnish with chopped scallions, if desired.
